title: Integration to send update to a Slack channel based on board group
excerpt:
In the Integrations Center, there is an integration to Slack that is “When an update is posted in this item, send it to channel” 
I need the same, but considering the group, not the item. So, that would be something like…

posts.author: enanni (Edi Nanni)
posts.cookedHtml:
In the Integrations Center, there is an integration to Slack that is “When an update is posted in this item, send it to channel”

I need the same, but considering the group, not the item. So, that would be something like:
“When an update is posted in this group, send it to channel”
